name: ye4wzp--aminer-academic-search
description: Academic data search and analysis using AMiner Open Platform APIs. Query scholars, papers, institutions, journals, and patents. Includes 6 composite workflows (Scholar Profile, Paper Deep Dive, Org Analysis, Venue Papers, Paper QA, Patent Analysis) and 28 individual APIs. Triggers: "AMiner", "学术数据", "查论文", "查学者", "学术搜索", "academic search", "paper search", "scholar lookup", "citation analysis".
